# 🔀 Pull Request

## 📋 Description

A clear and concise description of what this PR does.

> Example: "Adds support for Arabic keyword detection in the keyword engine"

---

## 🔗 Related Issue

Closes # (issue number)

---

## 🔄 Type of Change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] 📖 Documentation update
- [ ] 🧹 Refactor / Code cleanup
- [ ] 🌍 Language / keyword expansion

---

## 🧪 How Has This Been Tested?

Describe the tests you ran and how. Please confirm dry-run mode was tested.

- [ ] Tested with `dry_run: true` ✅
- [ ] Tested with live Facebook page
- [ ] Tested on Windows
- [ ] Tested on Linux / VPS

**Test Configuration:**
```jsonc
// Relevant config used during testing (no real cookies/tokens!)
{
  "reply_mode": "both",
  "scan_interval": 30,
  "dry_run": true
}
```

---

## ✅ Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's [coding standards](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] I have commented my code where necessary
- [ ] I have updated the `README.md` if needed
- [ ] My changes do not break dry-run mode
- [ ] I have not included any cookies, tokens, or credentials
- [ ] My branch name follows the convention (e.g. `feature/`, `fix/`, `docs/`)

---

## 📸 Screenshots (if applicable)

Add before/after screenshots or terminal output if helpful.

---

## 💬 Additional Notes

Anything else the reviewer should know?
